utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Alright, let's do standup. Ivan, you want to start? You worked late yesterday.

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Auth is fixed. Hotfix deployed at 3am.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Thanks Ivan. Are you okay? That's the third night this week.

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Fine.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Okay. Maria, how about you?

utterances.speaker: maria
utterances.text: Yesterday I finished the user pagination feature. Also reviewed Ivan's PR-51 and left comments — the auth flow needs a cleaner separation of concerns. I can pair with Ivan this afternoon if that works.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: That would be great, Maria. Ivan, does 3pm work?

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: Sure.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Tom?

utterances.speaker: tom
utterances.text: Working on rate limiting. PR-42 is ready but it's been waiting for review for 4 days now. It's blocking TASK-22 and TASK-23. Sprint ends Friday.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Ivan, can you look at PR-42 today? Or Maria, can you cover the review?

utterances.speaker: maria
utterances.text: I can do the auth-adjacent part of the review. I'll take it.

utterances.speaker: tom
utterances.text: That works, thanks Maria. Also ran into some flaky auth tests in CI — Peter, can you help investigate?

utterances.speaker: peter
utterances.text: Already on it, saw the failures yesterday. Will have a report by EOD.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Great. Anna?

utterances.speaker: anna
utterances.text: Dashboard performance improvements PR is up — PR-48. Maria please review when you have time. Also started working with Nikita on the LayerToggle component.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: How's Nikita doing?

utterances.speaker: anna
utterances.text: Really well, asking great questions. He's getting the hang of React patterns.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Excellent. Peter, quick update?

utterances.speaker: peter
utterances.text: Added regression tests for the auth race condition. Test suite is stable now. 148 passing.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Good. Blockers? Anyone stuck?

utterances.speaker: tom
utterances.text: Just the PR review. But Maria's taking it, so unblocked.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Ivan, any blockers? Do you need anything from me?

utterances.speaker: ivan
utterances.text: No.

utterances.speaker: marina
utterances.text: Okay. Ivan, let's do 1:1 at 11 today — I'll send a calendar invite. Everyone else — good standup, let's have a clean sprint closure. Maria, Tom — thank you for jumping on the review. See you tomorrow.

metadata.notes: Ivan spoke only 34 words — significantly below his historical average of 200+. Minimal participation, monosyllabic responses. Marina had to prompt him twice.
